name: Squash Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, cooked squash, and vanilla to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Sift together flour, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg into a bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk, until just mixed.
5. Chill the dough for about 30 minutes.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/3 inch.
7. Cut into rounds using a floured cutter.
8. Fry in deep fat preheated to 365°F (185°C) until golden brown.
9. Drain on paper towels.
